name: Fran's Cobb Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing by whisking together all ingredients until well combined.
2. Place a head of butter lettuce in individual salad plates or a large platter.
3. Spread shredded lettuce and finely chopped watercress over the butter lettuce leaves.
4. Arrange diced cooked chicken, bacon, hard-cooked eggs, peeled tomatoes, diced avocado, crumbled Roquefort or Bleu cheese, and chopped chives on top of the lettuce mixture in rows.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve the arranged salad at the table and add the dressing just before eating.
